minimax method, we construct a new mountain pass path and further obtain the
geometric link among the three solutions as well as a comparison of their
energy levels. This seems to be the first paper concerning three solutions,
with the method also being applicable to the single constraint problem.

</details>


### [747] [Global existence for full compressible Navier-Stokes equations around the Couette flow with a temperature gradient in an infinite channel](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04088)
*Tuowei Chen,Qiangchang Ju*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: Global strong solutions exist for the 2D compressible Navier-Stokes equations between moving and stationary walls with small temperature differences, under low Reynolds and Mach numbers. The low Mach limit is also shown for equal temperatures.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: The motivation is to understand the behavior of the two-dimensional full compressible Navier-Stokes equations in a specific physical setup (between two infinite parallel isothermal walls with a moving upper wall and temperature difference), and to establish conditions under which global strong solutions exist.

Method: The study employs mathematical analysis of the two-dimensional full compressible Navier-Stokes equations, focusing on initial states close to Couette flow with a temperature gradient. The analysis is conducted under conditions of low Reynolds and Mach numbers and small temperature differences.

Result: The results show that global strong solutions exist if the initial state is close to Couette flow with a temperature gradient, and the Reynolds and Mach numbers are low, along with a small temperature difference. The low Mach number limit is also proven for equal wall temperatures.

Conclusion: The paper concludes that global strong solutions exist for the two-dimensional full compressible Navier-Stokes equations under specific conditions, including low Reynolds and Mach numbers and a small temperature difference between the walls. Additionally, the low Mach number limit is demonstrated for the case of equal wall temperatures.

Abstract: This paper is concerned with the two-dimensional full compressible
Navier-Stokes equations between two infinite parallel isothermal walls, where
the upper wall is moving with a horizontal velocity, while the lower wall is
stationary, and there allows a temperature difference between the two walls. It
is shown that if the initial state is close to the Couette flow with a
temperature gradient, then the global strong solutions exist, provided that the
Reynolds and Mach numbers are low and the temperature difference between the
two walls is small. The low Mach number limit of the global strong solutions is
also shown for the case that both walls maintain the same temperature.

</details>


### [748] [Regularity of velocity averages in kinetic equations with heterogeneity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04102)
*Marko Erceg,Kenneth H. Karlsen,Darko Mitrović*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 研究了具有空间异质性的动力学方程的规律性，首次在一般异质环境下建立了定量正则性估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索在空间异质性条件下动力学方程的规律性，填补了现有研究中缺乏定量正则性估计的空白。

Method: 通过分析具有$x$依赖漂移向量的方程，利用非退化条件的定量版本，证明了特定积分形式的正则性。

Result: 证明了在分数Sobolev空间中存在正则性估计，适用于一般异质环境。

Conclusion: 该研究为异质守恒律的熵解提供了新的正则性估计，扩展了现有理论的应用范围。

Abstract: This study investigates the regularity of kinetic equations with spatial
heterogeneity. Recent progress has shown that velocity averages of weak
solutions $h$ in $L^p$ ($p>1$) are strongly $L^1_{\text{loc}}$ compact under
the natural non-degeneracy condition. We establish regularity estimates for
equations with an $\boldsymbol{x}$-dependent drift vector $\mathfrak{f} =
\mathfrak{f}(\boldsymbol{x}, \boldsymbol{\lambda})$, which satisfies a
quantitative version of the non-degeneracy condition. We prove that
$(t,\boldsymbol{x}) \mapsto \int \rho(\boldsymbol{\lambda})
h(t,\boldsymbol{x},\boldsymbol{\lambda})\, d\boldsymbol{\lambda}$, for any
sufficiently regular $\rho(\cdot)$, belongs to the fractional Sobolev space
$W_{\text{loc}}^{\beta,r}$, for some regularity $\beta\in (0,1)$ and
integrability $r \geq 1$ exponents. While such estimates have long been known
for $\boldsymbol{x}$-independent drift vectors
$\mathfrak{f}=\mathfrak{f}(\boldsymbol{\lambda})$, this is the first
quantitative regularity estimate in a general heterogeneous setting. As an
application, we obtain a regularity estimate for entropy solutions to
heterogeneous conservation laws with nonlinear flux and $L^\infty$ initial
data.

</details>


### [749] [Maximal Double-Exponential Growth for the Euler Equation on the Half-Plane](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04198)
*Andrej Zlatos*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 论文证明了欧拉方程在半平面上的光滑解可以表现出涡度梯度的双指数增长，并确定了最大可能的增长率，构造了达到该增长率的解。这是在无界或任何二维域上的首次结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究欧拉方程在半平面上的解的涡度梯度增长行为，填补了无界或二维域上相关研究的空白。

Method: 通过理论分析和构造性方法，证明了光滑解的双指数增长行为，并确定了最大增长率。

Result: 证明了涡度梯度可以双指数增长，构造了达到最大增长率的解。

Conclusion: 这是在无界或二维域上首次展示欧拉方程解的双指数增长行为，为相关研究提供了新的见解。

Abstract: We show that smooth solutions to the Euler equation on the half-plane can
exhibit double-exponential growth of their vorticity gradients. We also
determine the maximal possible growth rate and construct solutions that
saturate it. These appear to be the first such results on an unbounded resp.
any 2D domain.

</details>


### [750] [Existence of normalized solutions to nonlinear Schrödinger equations with potential on lattice graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04204)
*Weiqi Guan*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 论文研究了Schrödinger方程的归一化基态解存在性，证明了阈值α的存在性及其性质。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究Schrödinger方程在归一化条件下的基态解存在性，特别是在不同参数范围下的解的行为。

Method: 通过分析Schrödinger方程的解，结合Berestycki-Lions类型条件和其他合适条件，研究了归一化基态解的存在性。

Result: 证明了归一化基态解的存在性及其阈值α的性质，并给出了α为正的条件。

Conclusion: 论文证明了在Schrödinger方程中，存在一个阈值α，使得当a∈(0,α)时不存在归一化基态解，而当a∈(α,∞)时存在归一化基态解。此外，还给出了α为正的条件。

Abstract: We study the existence of ground state normalized solution of the following
Schr\"{o}dinger equation: \begin{equation*} \begin{cases} -\Delta
u+V(x)u+\lambda u=f(x,u), & x\in\mathbb{Z}^d \\ \Vert u\Vert_2^2=a \end{cases}
\end{equation*}
  where $V(x)$ is trapping potential or well potential, $f(x,u)$ satisfies
Berestycki-Lions type condition and other suitable conditions. We show that
there always exists a threshold $\alpha\in[0,\infty)$ such that there do not
exist ground state normalized solutions for $a\in (0,\alpha)$, and there exists
a ground state normalized solution for $a\in(\alpha,\infty)$. Furthermore, we
prove sufficient conditions for the positivity of $\alpha$ that $\alpha=0$ if
$f(x,u)$ is mass-subcritical near 0, and $\alpha>0$ if $f(x,u)$ is
mass-critical or mass-supercritical near 0.

</details>


### [751] [Existence of radially symmetric stationary solutions for viscous and Heat-conductive ideal Gas](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04234)
*Itsukoo Hashimoto,Akitaka Matsumura*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 论文研究了在无界球体外区域上可压缩粘性热传导多方理想流体的径向对称稳态解的存在性，证明了在远场状态的小邻域内，对于流入和流出问题，稳态解的唯一存在性，并获得了代数衰减率的估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究可压缩粘性热传导多方理想流体在无界球体外区域上的径向对称稳态解的存在性，以解决边界和远场条件下的流体动力学问题。

Method: 通过分析在远场状态的小邻域内，对流入和流出问题，证明了稳态解的唯一存在性，并推导了代数衰减率的估计。

Result: 证明了在远场状态的小邻域内，稳态解的唯一存在性，并获得了代数衰减率的估计。

Conclusion: 该研究为可压缩粘性热传导多方理想流体在无界区域上的稳态解提供了理论支持，并展示了其衰减行为。

Abstract: We consider the existence of radially symmetric stationary solutions of the
compressible viscous and heat-conductive polytropic ideal fluid on the
unbounded exterior domain of a sphere where the boundary and far-field
conditions are prescribed. The unique existence of the stationary solution is
shown for both inflow and outflow problems in a suitably small neighborhood of
the far-field state. Estimates of the algebraic decay rate toward the far field
state are also obtained.

</details>


### [752] [Existence Theory for a class of semilinear mixed local and nonlocal equations involving variable singularities and singular measures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04260)
*Sanjit Biswas,Prashanta Garain*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 本文证明了混合局部-非局部问题的弱解存在性，特别关注奇异测度数据的新处理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究奇异测度数据，这在常数指数情况下也是新的。

Method: 处理可变奇异指数和测度值数据，特别是源项可以是测度，奇异部分由奇异和非奇异测度共同建模。

Result: 建立了具有可变奇异指数和测度值数据的弱解存在性。

Conclusion: 本文证明了具有纯和扰动奇异非线性的一类混合局部-非局部问题的弱解的存在性。

Abstract: This article establishes the existence of weak solutions for a class of mixed
local-nonlocal problems with pure and perturbed singular nonlinearities. A key
novelty is the treatment of variable singular exponents alongside
measure-valued data. Notably, both source terms may be measures, with the
singular component modeled by both a singular and non-singular measure. Our
main focus is on the singular measure data, which appears to be new, even for
constant exponents.

</details>


### [753] [Fractional Infinity Laplacian with Obstacle](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04328)
*Samer Dweik,Ahmad Sabra*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: The paper proves existence and Hölder regularity of solutions to a fractional infinity Laplacian obstacle problem with a nonhomogeneous term, using approximation and Perron's method.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: The motivation is to address the obstacle problem for the fractional infinity Laplacian with a nonhomogeneous term, extending previous results and providing existence and regularity of solutions under specific conditions.

Method: The method involves approximating the nonhomogeneous term with a sequence of functions, using Perron's method to prove existence of solutions for each approximation, and then showing uniform Hölder estimates to ensure convergence to a solution.

Result: The main result is the existence of a Hölder continuous solution to the obstacle problem for the fractional infinity Laplacian with a nonhomogeneous term, under the given assumptions.

Conclusion: The paper concludes that a solution to the fractional infinity Laplacian obstacle problem with nonhomogeneous term exists under certain conditions, and the solution is Hölder continuous.

Abstract: This paper deals with the obstacle problem for the fractional infinity
Laplacian with nonhomogeneous term $f(u)$, where $f:\mathbb{R}^+ \mapsto
\mathbb{R}^+$: $$\begin{cases} L[u]=f(u) &\qquad in \{u>0\}\\ u \geq 0 &\qquad
in\, \Omega\\ u=g &\qquad on\, \partial \Omega\end{cases},$$ with
$$L[u](x)=\sup_{y\in \Omega,\,y\neq
x}\dfrac{u(y)-u(x)}{|y-x|^{\alpha}}+\inf_{y\in \Omega,\,y\neq x}
\dfrac{u(y)-u(x)}{|y-x|^\alpha},\qquad 0<\alpha<1.$$ Under the assumptions that
$f$ is a continuous and monotone function and that the boundary datum $g$ is in
$C^{0,\beta}(\partial\Omega)$ for some $0<\beta<\alpha$, we prove existence of
a solution $u$ to this problem. Moreover, this solution $u$ is
$\beta-$H\"olderian on $\overline{\Omega}$. Our proof is based on an
approximation of $f$ by an appropriate sequence of functions $f_\varepsilon$
where we prove using Perron's method the existence of solutions
$u_\varepsilon$, for every $\varepsilon>0$. Then, we show some uniform H\"older
estimates on $u_\varepsilon$ that guarantee that $u_\varepsilon \rightarrow u$
where this limit function $u$ turns out to be a solution to our obstacle
problem.

</details>


### [754] [Local/global well-posedness analysis of time-space fractional Schrödinger equation on $\mathbb{R}^{d}$](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04411)
*Yong Zhen Yang,Yong Zhou*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 本文研究了一类在时间和空间上均具有非局部效应的非线性时空分数Schrödinger方程，通过调和分析方法建立了Gagliardo-Nirenberg不等式，并证明了方程在某些Banach空间中的全局/局部适定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 由于非局部效应导致经典Strichartz估计失效，需要新的方法来研究此类方程的解的性质。

Method: 结合Mittag-Leffler函数的渐近行为、Hörmander乘子理论等调和分析方法，建立了Gagliardo-Nirenberg不等式，并获得了解算子的Sobolev估计。

Result: 证明了方程在某些Banach空间中的全局/局部适定性，结果与Su的研究互补但方法不同。

Conclusion: 通过调和分析方法和非局部算子的研究，成功解决了具有非局部效应的时空分数Schrödinger方程的适定性问题。

Abstract: Based on the $\phi(-\Delta)$-type operator studied by Kim \cite[\emph{Adv.
Math.}]{Kim2}, where $\phi$ is the Bernstein function, this paper investigates
a class of nonlinear time-space fractional Schr\"{o}dinger equations that
exhibit nonlocal effects in both time and space. The time part is derived from
the model proposed by Narahari Achar, and the space part is a
$\phi(-\Delta)$-type operator. Due to nonlocal effects, this invalidates the
classical Strichartz estimate. Combining the asymptotic behavior of
Mittag-Leffler functions, H\"{o}rmander multiplier theory and other methods of
harmonic analysis, we establish the Gagliardo-Nirenberg inequality in the
$\phi$-Triebel-Lizorkin space studied by Mikulevi\v{c}ius \cite[\emph{Potential
Anal.}]{Mikulevicius} and obtain some Sobolev estimates for the solution
operator, thus establishing the global/local well-posedness of the equations in
some Banach space. In particular, our results are complementary to those of Su
\cite[\emph{J. Math. Anal. Appl.}]{Su}, and the methods are quite different.

</details>


### [755] [Non-convergence of the principal eigenvalue of elliptic operators for large advection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04418)
*Xueli Bai,Zhi-An Wang,Xin Xu,Kexin Zhang,Maolin Zhou*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 本文研究了在强对流条件下，二阶线性椭圆算子的主特征值在极限情况下可能发散的现象，并给出了一个具体例子。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探讨主特征值在强对流条件下的收敛性问题，填补了此前研究的空白。

Method: 通过构造一个具体的例子，证明了主特征值在强对流条件下可以发散。

Result: 首次证明了主特征值在强对流条件下可能发散，并展示了其在反应-扩散模型中的应用。

Conclusion: 主特征值的发散行为在强对流条件下是可能的，这对理解相关模型的解行为具有重要意义。

Abstract: This paper investigates the limit of the principal eigenvalue $\lambda(s)$ as
$s\to+\infty$ for the following elliptic equation
  \begin{align*}
-\Delta\varphi(x)-2s\mathbf{v}\cdot\nabla\varphi(x)+c(x)\varphi(x)=\lambda(s)\varphi(x),
\quad x\in \Omega
  \end{align*} in a bounded domain $\Omega\subset \mathbb{R}^d (d\geq 1)$ with
the Neumann boundary condition. Previous studies have shown that under certain
conditions on $\mathbf{v}$, $\lambda(s)$ converges as $s\to\infty$ (including
cases where $\lim\limits_{s \to\infty }\lambda(s)=\pm\infty$). This work
constructs an example such that $\lambda(s)$ is divergent as $s\to+\infty$.
This seems to be the first rigorous result demonstrating the non-convergence of
the principal eigenvalue for second-order linear elliptic operators with some
strong advection. As an application, we demonstrate that for the classical
advection-reaction-diffusion model with advective velocity field
$\mathbf{v}=\nabla m$, where $m$ is a potential function with infinite
oscillations, the principal eigenvalue changes sign infinitely often along a
subsequence of $s\to\infty$. This leads to solution behaviors that differ
significantly from those observed when $m$ is non-oscillatory.

</details>


### [756] [On the well-posedness of time-space fractional Schrödinger equation on $\mathbb{R}^{d}$](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04433)
*Yong Zhen Yang,Yong Zhou*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 论文研究了时间-空间分数阶薛定谔方程的适定性，通过调和分析工具建立了新的色散估计，解决了导数损失问题，并展示了自相似解的存在性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究时间-空间分数阶薛定谔方程的适定性问题，以解决经典薛定谔方程中不适用的问题，如导数损失和无半群结构。

Method: 使用调和分析工具，包括Kenig和Ponce的平滑效应理论、实插值技术和Van der Corput引理，建立了新的色散估计。

Result: 证明了在Sobolev和Lorentz型空间中的局部和全局适定性，并分析了解的渐近行为。

Conclusion: 该论文通过建立新的色散估计，解决了时间-空间分数阶薛定谔方程的适定性问题，并分析了解的渐近行为，展示了自相似解的存在性。

Abstract: This paper considers the well-posedness of a class of time-space fractional
Schr\"{o}dinger equations introduced by Naber. In contrast to the classical
Schr\"{o}dinger equation, the solution operator here exhibits derivative loss
and lacks the structure of a semigroup, which makes the classical Strichartz
estimates inapplicable. By using harmonic analysis tools -- including the
smoothing effect theory of Kenig and Ponce for Korteweg-de Vries equations
\cite[\emph{Commun.~Pure Appl.~Math.}]{Kenig}, real interpolation techniques,
and the Van der Corput lemma -- we establish novel dispersive estimates for the
solution operator. These estimates generalize Ponce's regularity results
\cite[\emph{J.~Funct.~Anal.}]{Ponce} for oscillatory integrals and enable us to
address the derivative loss in the Schr\"{o}dinger kernel. For the cases
$\beta<2$~(in one space dimension) and $\beta>2$~(in higher dimensions), we
prove local and global well-posedness in Sobolev and Lorentz-type spaces,
respectively. Additionally, we analyze the asymptotic behavior of solutions and
demonstrate the existence of self-similar solutions under homogeneous initial
data. The results highlight the interplay between fractional derivatives,
dispersive properties, and nonlinear dynamics, extending the understanding of
nonlocal evolution equations in quantum mechanics and related fields.

</details>


### [757] [Characterising buried objects in metal detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04450)
*P. D. Ledger,W. R. B. Lionheart*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的渐近展开方法，用于考虑土壤导电性和磁导率对金属探测中高导电埋藏物体识别的影响，提高了识别精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数学模型假设土壤不导电且磁导率与自由空间相同，但实际土壤的导电性和磁导率不可忽略且受多种因素影响，这对金属探测器的测量电压有重要影响。

Method: 开发了一种新的渐近展开方法，用于描述高导电磁性埋藏物体尺寸趋近于零时的扰动磁场，并考虑了土壤条件。

Result: 新方法的领先项可以表示为一个复对称二阶磁极化张量，该张量有助于物体识别，并提供了独立于土壤条件计算张量系数的条件。

Conclusion: 新方法在考虑土壤导电性和磁导率的情况下，显著提高了识别精度，优于忽略土壤特性的情况。

Abstract: Current mathematical models for identifying highly conducting buried objects
in metal detection assume that the soil is non-conducting and has the same
permeability as free space. However, although the electrical conductivity of
soil is low, it is not negligible and depends on factors such as soil type and
salinity. Moreover, the magnetic permeability of soil varies with its iron
content and is often described as uncooperative. Depending on the ground
conditions, these soil's properties can influence the induced voltages in the
measurement coils of metal detectors and becomes of increasing importance as
the frequency of the exciting current source is increased. In this work, we
develop a new asymptotic expansion for the perturbed magnetic field due to the
presence of a highly conducting magnetic buried object as its size tends to
zero, which takes account of the ground conditions. The leading order term of
this expansion can be expressed in terms of a complex symmetric rank-2 magnetic
polarizability tensor, which characterises the object, can assist in its
identification, and we provide conditions under which this tensor's
coefficients can be computed independently of the ground conditions. We
demonstrate the improved accuracy of our new result, which takes account of the
ground conditions, over the situation where the soil's conductivity and
permeability are not considered.

</details>


### [758] [Non-radial minimizers for Hardy--Sobolev inequalities in non-convex cones](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04470)
*A. I. Nazarov,N. V. Rastegaev*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 在非凸锥中，Hardy-Sobolev驱动的Neumann问题在特定条件下存在非径向解，导致多解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究非凸锥中由Hardy--Sobolev不等式驱动的Neumann问题的对称性破缺现象。

Method: 通过分析Beltrami--Laplace算子在锥的球面截面上的第一Neumann特征值，证明了径向解的非极值性。

Result: 在特定条件下，径向解不能是极值函数，因此极小化解必须是非径向的，从而产生多解。

Conclusion: 在非凸锥中，通过Hardy-Sobolev不等式驱动的Neumann问题，证明了在某些条件下径向解不能是极值函数，从而导致了多解的存在。

Abstract: The symmetry breaking is obtained for Neumann problems driven by
$p$-Laplacian in certain non-convex cones. These problems are generated by the
Hardy--Sobolev inequalities. In the case of the Sobolev inequality for the
ordinary Laplacian this problem was investigated in (Ciraolo, Pacella, Polvara,
2024).
  Such problems have obvious radial solutions -- Talenti--Bliss type functions
of $|x|$. However, under a certain restriction on the first Neumann eigenvalue
$\lambda_1(D)$ of the Beltrami--Laplace operator on the spherical cross-section
$D$ of the cone we prove this radial solution cannot be an extremal function,
therefore minimizer must be non-radial. This leads to multiple solutions for
the corresponding Neumann problem.

</details>


### [759] [Existence and multiplicity of normalized solutions to a large class of elliptic equations on bounded domains with general boundary conditions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04624)
*Claudianor O. Alves,Zhentao He,Chao Ji*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 通过扰动方法研究非线性薛定谔方程的归一化解，展示了其在其他方程中的应用潜力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究非线性薛定谔方程在特定边界条件和归一化约束下的解的性质，扩展方法到其他相关方程。

Method: 采用扰动方法，结合边界条件和拉格朗日乘数技术，分析非线性薛定谔方程的归一化解。

Result: 证明了归一化解的存在性和多重性，并展示了方法在多种方程中的适用性。

Conclusion: 本文通过扰动方法研究了非线性薛定谔方程的归一化解的存在性和多重性，并展示了该方法在其他方程中的潜在应用。

Abstract: In this paper, by adapting the perturbation method, we study the existence
and multiplicity of normalized solutions for the following nonlinear
Schr\"odinger equation
  $$
  \left\{
  \begin{array}{ll}
  -\Delta u = \lambda u + f(u)\quad & \text{in } \Omega,
  \mathcal{B}_{\alpha,\zeta,\gamma}u = 0 & \text{on } \partial \Omega,
  \int_{\Omega} |u|^2\,dx = \mu,
  \end{array}
  \right.
  \leqno{(P)^\mu_{\alpha,\zeta,\gamma}}
  $$
  where $\Omega \subset \mathbb{R}^N$ ($N \geq 1$) is a smooth bounded domain,
$\mu>0$ is prescribed, $\lambda \in \mathbb{R}$ is a part of the unknown which
appears as a Lagrange multiplier, $f,g:\mathbb{R} \to \mathbb{R}$ are
continuous functions satisfying some technical conditions. The boundary
operator $\mathcal{B}_{\alpha,\zeta,\gamma}$ is defined by
  $$
  \mathcal{B}_{\alpha,\zeta,\gamma}u=\alpha u+\zeta \frac{\partial u}{\partial
\eta }-\gamma g(u),
  $$ where $\alpha,\zeta,\gamma \in \{0,1\}$ and $\eta$ denotes the outward
unit normal on $\partial\Omega$. Moreover, we highlight several further
applications of our approach, including the nonlinear Schr\"{o}dinger equations
with critical exponential growth in $\mathbb{R}^{2}$, the nonlinear
Schr\"{o}dinger equations with magnetic fields, the biharmonic equations, and
the Choquard equations, among others.

</details>


### [760] [Multi-vortices and lower bounds on the attractor dimensions for 2D Navier--Stokes equations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04645)
*Anna Kostianko,Alexei Ilyin,Dominic Stone,Sergey Zelik*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于多涡流的新方法，用于估计流体动力学方程吸引子维数的下界，并应用于经典2D Navier-Stokes方程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 此前对于有界域和全平面情况下的Navier-Stokes方程，缺乏有效的吸引子维数下界估计方法。

Method: 使用多涡流（由Vishik涡流组成）作为Kolmogorov流的替代，进行吸引子维数的下界估计。

Result: 在有界域中得到了类似环面和球面的估计，全平面情况下得到了尖锐的估计。

Conclusion: 该方法不仅重现了已知结果，还适用于其他流体动力学方程。

Abstract: We present a principally new method, which is not based on the Kolmogorov
flows, for obtaining the lower bounds for the attractors dimensions of the
equations related with hydrodynamics and apply it to the classical 2D
Navier--Stokes equations in a bounded domain as well as for the Navier--Stokes
equations with Ekman damping in the whole plane. In the case of bounded
domains, we give the lower bounds, which are similar to the well-known estimate
on a torus and sphere and in the case of the whole plane our estimate is sharp.
Note that no lower bounds for these two cases were known before. \par We
suggest to use the so-called multi-vortex, which consists of a well-separated
Vishik vortices (i.e., spectrally unstable localized in space flows constructed
by M.M. Vishik), as the analogue of the Kolmogorov flows. Note also that this
method reproduces the known result on the torus and that it is applicable to
many other equations of hydrodynamics.

</details>


### [761] [Perimeter on a manifold, with applications to partial differential equations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04740)
*Satyanad Kichenassamy*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种在闭黎曼流形上推广可测子集周长的定义，并证明了其与热核正则化的极限关系，同时推广了等周不等式和Fleming-Rishel公式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统对称化方法在解决某些拟线性椭圆问题时失效，因此需要引入新的对称化方法。

Method: 通过热核正则化定义子集的周长，并推广到闭黎曼流形上。

Result: 证明了周长与热核正则化的极限关系，推广了等周不等式和Fleming-Rishel公式。

Conclusion: 提出的球面对称化方法成功解决了传统方法失效的拟线性椭圆问题。

Abstract: The perimeter of a measurable subset of $\mathbb R^N$ is the total variation
of its characteristic function. We generalize this notion to a subset $E$ of a
closed Riemannian manifold. We show that the perimeter of $E$ is the limit of
the hear kernel regularization of its characteristic function. A generalization
of the isoperimetric inequality and of the Fleming-Rishel formula follow. These
results are applied to a quasilinear elliptic problem in $\mathbb R^N$ for
which the usual symmetrization methods fail. It will be tackled successfully by
introducing a symmetrization method on the sphere.

</details>


### [762] [Global strong solution of the 3D compressible liquid crystal flows with density-dependent viscosity and large velocity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04760)
*Jiaxu Li,Yu Mei,Rong Zhang*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 本文研究了三维可压缩液晶流体的柯西问题，证明了在初始密度足够大且初始导向器导数足够小时，存在唯一的全局强解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究三维可压缩液晶流体的全局强解存在性，避免对速度的小限制。

Method: 通过假设粘度系数为密度的幂函数（幂大于1），分析初始条件对解的影响。

Result: 证明了在初始密度足够大且初始导向器导数足够小时，系统存在唯一的全局强解。

Conclusion: 这是首次在不限制速度小的情况下，获得三维可压缩液晶流体的全局强解结果。

Abstract: This paper concerns the Cauchy problem of three-dimensional compressible
liquid crystal flows with density-dependent viscosity. When the viscosity
coefficients $\mu_1(\rho),\mu_2(\rho)$ are power functions of the density with
the power larger than $1$, it is proved that the system exists a unique global
strong solution as long as the initial density is sufficiently large and
$L^3$-norm of the derivative of the initial director is sufficiently small.
This is the first result concerning the global strong solution for
three-dimensional compressible liquid crystal flows without smallness of
velocity.

</details>


### [763] [Direct reconstruction of general elastic inclusions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04831)
*Sarah Eberle-Blick,Henrik Garde,Nuutti Hyvönen*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种单调性方法的通用外逼近方法，用于同时处理有限和极端对比的正负夹杂物。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究如何在弹性力学中重建夹杂物，尤其是当夹杂物表现为背景Lamé参数的偏差时。

Method: 采用单调性方法，扩展其适用范围，允许同时存在正负夹杂物，包括有限和极端对比的情况。

Result: 证明了单调性方法的通用外逼近方法，适用于多种夹杂物情况。

Conclusion: 该方法为弹性力学中的夹杂物重建提供了一种更通用的解决方案。

Abstract: The inverse problem of linear elasticity is to determine the Lam\'e
parameters, which characterize the mechanical properties of a domain, from
pairs of pressure activations and the resulting displacements on its boundary.
This work considers the specific problem of reconstructing inclusions that
manifest themselves as deviations from the background Lam\'e parameters.
  The monotonicity method is a direct reconstruction method that has previously
been considered for domains only containing positive (or negative) inclusions
with finite contrast. That is, all inclusions have previously been assumed to
correspond to a finite increase (or decrease) in both Lam\'e parameters
compared to their background values. We prove the general outer approach of the
monotonicity method that simultaneously allows positive and negative
inclusions, of both finite and extreme contrast; the latter refers to either
infinitely stiff or perfectly elastic materials.

</details>


### [764] [Existence of solutions with prescribed frequency for the perturbed Schrödinger-Bopp-Podolsky system in bounded domains](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04914)
*Danilo Gregorin Afonso,Bruno Mascaro*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 论文通过变分法和对称Mountain Pass定理，证明了非线性扰动的Schrödinger-Bopp-Podolsky系统在Dirichlet边界条件下有无限多个解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究在非线性扰动下，Schrödinger-Bopp-Podolsky系统在Dirichlet边界条件下的解的存在性和多样性。

Method: 采用变分方法，并基于对称版本的Mountain Pass定理进行证明。

Result: 证明了系统在给定条件下存在无限多个解。

Conclusion: 该论文证明了在Dirichlet边界条件下，Schrödinger-Bopp-Podolsky系统在有限域内具有无限多个具有规定频率的解，前提是Schrödinger方程受到适当的非线性扰动。

Abstract: In this paper, we show that the Schr\"odinger-Bopp-Podolsky system with
Dirichlet boundary conditions in a bounded domain possesses infinitely many
solutions of prescribed frequency, for any set of (continuous) boundary
conditions, provided that the Schr\"odinger equation is perturbed with a
suitable nonlinearity. Our approach is variational, and our proof is based on a
symmetric variant of the Mountain Pass theorem.

</details>


### [765] [Irregular double-phase evolution problem: existence and global regularity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04924)
*Rakesh Arora,Sergey Shmarev*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 研究了具有非光滑系数的双相演化方程的Dirichlet问题，证明了在特定条件下解的存在性、高阶可积性和二阶正则性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究双相演化方程的解的性质，特别是在非光滑系数和变指数条件下的解的存在性和正则性。

Method: 通过正则化问题的经典解序列逼近，证明了原问题的解的存在性，并分析了其高阶可积性和二阶正则性。

Result: 证明了在给定条件下，解存在且具有高阶可积性和二阶正则性。

Conclusion: 在非光滑系数和变指数条件下，双相演化方程的Dirichlet问题存在解，且解具有高阶可积性和二阶正则性。

Abstract: We investigate the homogeneous Dirichlet problem for the irregular
double-phase evolution equation \[ u_t-\operatorname{div} \left( a(z)|\nabla
u|^{p(z)-2} \nabla u + b(z)|\nabla u|^{q(z)-2} \nabla u\right)=f(z),\quad
z=(x,t)\in Q_T:=\Omega\times (0,T),
  \] where $\Omega \subset \mathbb{R}^N$, $N \geq 2$ is a bounded domain,
$T>0$, The non-differentiable coefficients $a(z)$, $b(z)$, the free term $f$,
and the variable exponents $p$, $q$ are given functions. The coefficients $a$
and $b$ are nonnegative, bounded, satisfy the inequality \[ a(z)+b(z)\geq
\alpha \quad \text{in} \ Q_T, \quad \text{and} \quad |\nabla a|, |\nabla b|,
a_t, b_t \in L^d(Q_T) \] for some constant $\alpha>0$, and with $d>2$ depending
on $\sup p(z)$, $\sup q(z)$, $N$, and the regularity of initial data $u(x,0)$.
The free term $f$ and initial data $u(x,0)$ satisfy \[ f\in L^\sigma(Q_T) \
\text{with} \ \sigma>2 \quad \text{and} \quad |\nabla u(x,0)|\in L^{r}(\Omega)
\ \text{with} \ r\geq \max \bigg\{2,\sup_{Q_T}p(z),\sup_{Q_T}q(z)\bigg\}. \]
The variable exponents $p,q \in C^{0,1}(\overline{Q}_T)$ satisfy the balance
condition \[ \frac{2N}{N+2} < p(z), q(z)< +\infty \ \text{in} \ \overline Q_T
\quad \text{and} \quad \max\limits_{\overline Q_T}|p(z)-q(z)|< \dfrac{2}{N+2}.
\] Under the above assumptions, we establish the existence of a solution, which
is obtained as the limit of classical solutions to a family of regularized
problems and preserves initial temporal integrability: \[
  |\nabla u(\cdot, t)| \in L^r(\Omega) \ \text{for a.e.} \ t \in (0,T), \]
gains global higher integrability: \[ |\nabla u|^{\min\{p(z), q(z)\} + s +r}
\in L^1(Q_T) \ \text{for any} \ s \in \left(0, \frac{4}{N+2}\right), \] and
attains second-order regularity: \[ a(z) |\nabla u|^{\frac{p+r-2}{2}}+b(z)
|\nabla u|^{\frac{q+r-2}{2}}\in L^2(0,T;W^{1,2}(\Omega)). \]

</details>


### [766] [Note on injectivity in second-gradient Nonlinear Elasticity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04938)
*Stanislav Hencl,Kaushik Mohanta*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 该论文研究了在特定条件下，二阶Sobolev空间中的平面映射在满足边界条件时为同胚映射的充分条件，并给出了关于Jacobian行列式为零的集合投影的尖锐结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究二阶Sobolev空间中的平面映射在满足特定条件时是否为同胚映射，并探讨Jacobian行列式为零的集合的投影性质。

Method: 通过分析二阶Sobolev空间中的映射性质，结合边界条件和Jacobian行列式的条件，证明映射为同胚的充分条件。

Result: 证明了在条件$(1-\frac{1}{q})a\geq 1$下，映射为同胚，且该条件是尖锐的；同时给出了关于Jacobian行列式为零的集合投影的新尖锐结果。

Conclusion: 该研究为二阶Sobolev空间中的平面映射提供了同胚性的充分条件，并扩展了对Jacobian行列式为零集合投影的理解。

Abstract: Let $q>1$, $(1-\frac{1}{q})a\geq 1$ and let $\Omega\subset \mathbb{R}^2$ be
Lipschitz domain. We show that planar mappings in the second order Sobolev
space $f\in W^{2,q}(\Omega,\mathbb{R}^2)$ with $|J_f|^{-a}\in L^1(\Omega)$ are
homeomorphism if they agree with a homeomorphism on the boundary. The condition
$(1-\frac{1}{q})a\geq 1$ is sharp. We also have a new sharp result about the
$\mathcal{H}^{n-1}$ measure of the projection of the set $\{J_f=0\}$ in
$\mathbb{R}^n$.

</details>


### [767] [Notes on $L^2$-estimates in linear elliptic equations with general coefficients](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04940)
*Haesung Lee*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无散度变换方法，为线性椭圆方程的弱解建立了显式的$L^2$估计，提供了可计算的常数$C>0$，适用于需要显式误差界的应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法基于紧性论证，无法提供显式常数。本文旨在通过新方法为线性椭圆方程的弱解提供显式的$L^2$估计，以满足如物理信息神经网络（PINNs）等应用中显式误差界的需求。

Method: 采用无散度变换方法，避免了传统的紧性论证，提供了显式的常数$C>0$。

Result: 证明了$u$的$L^2$范数由$f$的$L^2$范数的常数倍控制，且常数$C>0$随扩散系数或零阶项的增加而减小。

Conclusion: 本文通过一种无散度变换方法，为线性椭圆方程的弱解建立了显式的$L^2$估计，证明了$u$的$L^2$范数在区域$U$上由$f$的$L^2$范数的常数倍所控制。该方法提供了可计算的显式常数$C>0$，且该估计在无零阶项时仍保持鲁棒性。

Abstract: This paper establishes an explicit $L^2$-estimate for weak solutions $u$ to
linear elliptic equations in divergence form with general coefficients and
external source term $f$, stating that the $L^2$-norm of $u$ over $U$ is
bounded by a constant multiple of the $L^2$-norm of $f$ over $U$. In contrast
to classical approaches based on compactness arguments, the proposed method,
which employs a divergence-free transformation method, provides a computable
and explicit constant $C>0$. The $L^2$-estimate remains robust even when there
is no zero-order term, and the analysis further demonstrates that the constant
$C>0$ decreases as the diffusion coefficient or the zero-order term increases.
These quantitative results provide a rigorous foundation for applications such
as a posteriori error estimates in Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs),
where explicit error bounds are essential.

</details>


### [768] [Asymmetric Self-similar Spiral Solutions of 2-D Incomressible Euler Equations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.05059)
*Hyungjun Choi*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 本文扩展了二维不可压缩欧拉方程的代数螺旋解，构建了非径向的自相似解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究在没有旋转对称性的情况下，二维不可压缩欧拉方程的解的性质。

Method: 通过构造非径向的自相似解，突破了旋转对称性的限制。

Result: 成功构建了非径向的自相似解，并推广了已有的代数螺旋解。

Conclusion: 本文构建了二维不可压缩欧拉方程的非径向自相似解，扩展了Elling和Shao-Wei-Zhang的代数螺旋解。

Abstract: We construct nonradial, self-similar solutions to the two-dimensional
incompressible Euler equations in the absence of rotational symmetry. This
generalizes the algebraic spiral solutions of Elling and Shao-Wei-Zhang.

</details>


<div id='math.CA'></div>

# math.CA [[Back]](#toc)

### [769] [Carnot-Carathéodory Balls on Manifolds with Boundary](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.03501)
*Brian Street*

Main category: math.CA

TL;DR: 本文推广了Carnot-Carathéodory球的定量理论到有边界流形，首次在内部和非特征边界部分引入缩放映射，为研究极大次椭圆边值问题提供了新工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Nagel、Stein和Wainger的工作为无边界光滑流形上的Carnot-Carathéodory球提供了定量研究，但尚未扩展到有边界的情况。本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 引入了适用于Carnot-Carathéodory球和Hörmander向量场的缩放映射，并将其推广到具有边界的流形。

Result: 成功将有边界流形的内部和非特征边界部分纳入定量理论框架，为后续研究极大次椭圆边值问题奠定了基础。

Conclusion: 本文提出了一个定量理论的推广，适用于具有边界的流形，其中在内部和非特征边界部分都引入了缩放映射。这是研究极大次椭圆边值问题的系列论文中的第一篇。

Abstract: Nagel, Stein, and Wainger introduced a detailed quantitative study of
Carnot--Carath\'eodory balls on a smooth manifold without boundary. Most
importantly, they introduced scaling maps adapted to Carnot--Carath\'eodory
balls and H\"ormander vector fields. Their work was extended by many authors
and has since become a key tool in the study of the interior theory of
subelliptic PDEs; in particular, the study of maximally subelliptic PDEs. We
introduce a generalization of this quantitative theory to manifolds with
boundary, where we have scaling maps both on the interior and on the part of
the boundary which is non-characteristic with respect to the vector fields.
This is the first paper in a forthcoming series devoted to studying maximally
subelliptic boundary value problems.

</details>


### [770] [Some two-parameter families of generalized Bernstein functions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.03551)
*Stamatis Koumandos,Henrik L. Pedersen*

Main category: math.CA

TL;DR: 论文证明了Gamma和Psi函数比值的函数属于广义Bernstein类，并揭示了其新性质。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究Gamma函数和Psi函数比值的性质，扩展广义Bernstein函数的理论框架。

Method: 通过分析Gamma函数和Psi函数的比值，结合广义Bernstein类的定义，证明了这些函数的性质。

Result: 证明了某些函数属于广义Bernstein类，并发现了广义Bernstein函数的新性质。

Conclusion: 论文证明了涉及Gamma函数和Psi函数比值的某些函数属于广义Bernstein类，并给出了广义Bernstein函数的新性质。

Abstract: We prove that certain functions involving ratios of Gamma functions and the
Psi-function belong to generalized Bernstein classes and new properties of
generalized Bernstein functions are given.

</details>


### [771] [Eigenvalue equations for sieved polynomials or proving Askey right again](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.03862)
*Luc Vinet,Alexei Zhedanov*

Main category: math.CA

TL;DR: 本文证明了Askey提出的筛Jacobi多项式是某种Dunkl型算子的本征函数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Askey曾提出筛Jacobi多项式可能是某个算子的本征函数，但长期以来未得到证明。

Method: 通过将Askey-Wilson多项式中的$q$取为单位根，得到筛Jacobi多项式，并研究其算子性质。

Result: 证明了筛Jacobi多项式是Dunkl型算子的本征函数，该算子包含与$q$的幂对应的循环反射。

Conclusion: Askey的猜想是正确的，筛Jacobi多项式确实是Dunkl型算子的本征函数。

Abstract: The sieved Jacobi polynomials have been introduced by Askey. These can be
obtained from conveniently taking $q$ to be a root of unity in the Askey-Wilson
polynomials. The question of determining if they are eigenfunctions of some
operator has been lingering for a long time. Askey impressed on us his
conviction that it had an affirmative answer. It is shown that he was right and
that this operator is of Dunkl type with cyclic reflections corresponding to
the powers of $q$.

</details>


### [772] [A Novel Schwartz Space for the $\left(k,\frac{2}{n}\right)-$Generalized Fourier Transform](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04064)
*Nelson Faustino,Selma Negzaoui*

Main category: math.CA

TL;DR: Error


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Error

Method: Error

Result: Error

Conclusion: Error

Abstract: In this study, we introduce the generalized Schwartz space
$\mathcal{S}_{k,n}(\mathbb{R})$, designed specifically for the
$\left(k,\frac{2}{n}\right)-$generalized Fourier transform
$\mathcal{F}_{k,n}:=\mathcal{F}_{k,\frac{2}{n}}$. We establish that
$\mathcal{S}_{k,n}(\mathbb{R})$ is invariant under $\mathcal{F}_{k,n}$ and
explore its principal properties in detail. Furthermore, by defining the
subspace $\mathcal{D}_{k,n}(\mathbb{R})$, consisting of functions with bounded
support, we show that the subspace is dense in $L^p(d\mu_{k,n})$ for $1 \leq p
< \infty$. Lastly, we address a conjecture regarding the higher-dimensional
scenario.

</details>


### [773] [Explicit Formulas For Generalized Polylogarithmic Integrals, Euler Sums, And BBP-Type Series](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04205)
*Ali Olaikhan*

Main category: math.CA

TL;DR: 本文研究了五参数多对数积分的闭式表达式，以Lerch超越函数表示，并简化为多种特殊函数，同时讨论了相关级数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究多对数积分的闭式表达式，以扩展对特殊函数和积分表达的理解，并为相关数学问题提供新的解析工具。

Method: 通过数学推导和分析，探索了五参数多对数积分的闭式表达式，并利用Lerch超越函数及其简化形式进行表达。

Result: 成功推导出五参数多对数积分的闭式表达式，并展示了其在特殊函数中的应用，同时探讨了相关的Euler和与BBP型级数。

Conclusion: 本文通过研究五参数的多对数积分，给出了以Lerch超越函数表示的闭式表达式，并在某些情况下简化为著名的特殊函数，如Riemann zeta、Dirichlet eta、Dirichlet beta、Hurwitz zeta和polygamma函数。此外，还讨论了相关的Euler和与BBP型级数。

Abstract: This paper explores closed-form expressions for some polylogarithm integrals
with integrands containing five parameters. These closed form expressions are
given in terms of the Lerch transcendent function, which reduces, in some
cases, to well-known special functions, such as the Riemann zeta, Dirichlet
eta, Dirichlet beta, the Hurwitz zeta, and the polygamma functions. Related
Euler sums and BBP-type series will also be discussed.

</details>


### [774] [The Bilinear Hilbert-Carleson operator along curves. The purely non-zero curvature case](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04467)
*Árpád Bényi,Bingyang Hu,Victor Lie*

Main category: math.CA

TL;DR: 本文证明了双线性Hilbert-Carleson算子在非零曲率设置下的最大有界范围，并给出了具体的范数估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究双线性Hilbert-Carleson算子在非零曲率设置下的有界性，填补了该领域的理论空白。

Method: 使用了Rank II LGC方法（来自arXiv:2308.10706）来证明算子的有界性。

Result: 证明了算子BHC在Hölder范围内满足范数估计，即对于特定参数范围，算子是有界的。

Conclusion: 本文证明了在非零曲率设置下，双线性Hilbert-Carleson算子沿曲线的最大有界范围（直到端点），并给出了具体的算子范数估计。

Abstract: In this paper, we provide the maximal boundedness range (up to end-points)
for the Bilinear Hilbert-Carleson operator along curves in the (purely)
non-zero curvature setting. More precisely, we show that the operator $$
BHC_{[\vec{a},\vec{\alpha}]}(f_1,f_2)(x) := \sup_{\lambda\in\mathbb{R}}
\left|\,p.v.\, \int_{\mathbb{R}} f_1(x - a_1 t^{\alpha_1}) \,f_2(x - a_2
t^{\alpha_2}) \,e^{i\,\lambda\,a_3 \,t^{\alpha_3}} \,\frac{dt}{t}\right|$$
obeys the bounds $$\|BHC_{[\vec{a},\vec{\alpha}]} (f_1,f_2)\|_{L^r}
\lesssim_{\vec{a} \,\vec{\alpha},r,p_1,p_2}
\|f_1\|_{L^{p_1}}\,\|f_2\|_{L^{p_2}}$$ whenever
$\vec{a}=(a_1,a_2,a_3),\,\vec{\alpha}=(\alpha_1,\alpha_2,\alpha_3)\in
(\mathbb{R}\setminus\{0\})^3$ with $\vec{\alpha}$ having pairwise distinct
coordinates and for any H\"older range
$\frac{1}{p_1}+\frac{1}{p_2}=\frac{1}{r}$ with $1<p_1,p_2<\infty$ and
$\frac{1}{2}<r<\infty$. This result is achieved via the Rank II LGC method
introduced in arXiv:2308.10706.

</details>


### [775] [Sharp estimates of the Schrödinger type propagators on modulation spaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.05039)
*Weichao Guo,Guoping Zhao*

Main category: math.CA

TL;DR: 本文研究了调制空间中傅里叶积分算子的有界性，改进了现有结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究Schrödinger型算子中傅里叶积分算子在调制空间中的有界性，填补现有理论的空白。

Method: 通过对符号和相位函数进行合理分解和缩放，确保其属于适当的混合调制空间。

Result: 结论覆盖了相位函数的温和和高增长两种新情况，结果是最优的。

Conclusion: 本文的结论是对现有结果的实质性改进和推广，且在某种意义上是最优的。

Abstract: This paper is devoted to conducting a comprehensive and self-contained study
of the boundedness on modulation spaces of Fourier integral operators arising
when solving Schr\"{o}dinger type operators. The symbols of these operators
belong to the Sj\"{o}strand class $M^{\infty,1}$, and their phase functions
satisfy certain regularity conditions associated with mixed modulation spaces.
Our conclusions cover two novel situations corresponding to the so-called mild
and high growth of phase functions. These conclusions represent essential
improvements and generalizations of existing results. Our method is based on a
reasonable decomposition and scaling of the symbol and phase functions,
ensuring their membership in appropriate mixed modulation spaces. In a certain
sense, all conclusions of this paper are optimal.

</details>


### [776] [On the approximation properties of Stieltjes polynomials](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.05080)
*Víctor Cora,F. Adrián F. Tojo*

Main category: math.CA

TL;DR: 论文研究了$g$-多项式的逼近性质，证明了其在一致$g$-连续函数空间中的稠密性，类似于Weierstrass定理，但更一般情况的表征仍开放。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索Stieltjes微积分框架下的逼近性质，特别是$g$-多项式的逼近能力。

Method: 通过研究具有有限间断点的导子$g$，证明了$g$-多项式在一致$g$-连续函数空间中的稠密性。

Result: 证明了$g$-多项式在一致$g$-连续函数空间中是稠密的。

Conclusion: 论文证明了在Stieltjes微积分框架下，$g$-多项式在一致$g$-连续函数空间中是稠密的，类似于Weierstrass逼近定理。但对于更一般的$g$行为，其闭包的表征仍是一个开放性问题。

Abstract: We introduce and study the approximation properties of $g$-polynomials,
defined as linear combinations of iterated Stieltjes integrals of a constant
function. Focusing on the case where the derivator $g$ has finitely many
discontinuities, we prove that the space of $g$-polynomials is dense in the
space of uniformly $g$-continuous functions. This result establishes a
Weierstrass-type approximation theorem within the framework of Stieltjes
calculus. The characterization of the closure of the space of $g$-polynomials
in the general case, where the derivator may exhibit more complex behavior,
remains an open and challenging problem, which we briefly discuss.

</details>


### [777] [One sided orthogonal polynomials and a pointwise convergence result for $SU(2)$-valued nonlinear Fourier series](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.05124)
*Michel Alexis,Gevorg Mnatsakanyan,Christoph Thiele*

Main category: math.CA

TL;DR: 论文研究了SU(2)值非线性傅里叶级数与正交多项式序列的联系，证明了再生核的收敛性，并展示了几乎处处收敛的结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索SU(2)值非线性傅里叶级数与正交多项式序列之间的关系，并研究其收敛性质。

Method: 通过研究SU(2)值非线性傅里叶级数与单位圆上复测度的左右正交多项式序列之间的联系，分析了相关再生核的收敛性。

Result: 证明了再生核的收敛性，并展示了左右多项式及其平方的几乎处处点收敛性与其零点行为的关系。

Conclusion: 论文证明了在非线性傅里叶级数满足特定条件下，部分SU(2)值非线性傅里叶级数的函数形式几乎处处收敛。

Abstract: We elaborate on a connection between the $SU(2)$-valued nonlinear Fourier
series and sequences of left and right orthogonal polynomials for complex
measures on the unit circle. We show a convergence result for the associated
reproducing kernel. This is a universality type result in the vein of
Mate-Nevai-Totik, which turns out to be much simpler in the $SU(2)$ case than
in the $SU(1,1)$ case. We then relate a.e. pointwise convergence of the product
of left and right polynomials and their squares with both behavior of their
zeros as well as behavior of some local parameters for these polynomials. We
conclude by proving almost everywhere convergence along lacunary sequences of
the functional $(a_n ^* +b_n)(a_n - b_n ^*)$ of the partial $SU(2)$-valued
nonlinear Fourier series $(a_n, b_n)$ under the assumption that the nonlinear
Fourier series $(a,b)$ itself satisfies both $\|b\|_{L^{\infty} (\mathbb{T})} <
2^{- \frac 1 2}$ and $a^*$ is outer.

</details>


<div id='stat.ML'></div>

# stat.ML [[Back]](#toc)

### [778] [Beyond SEO: A Transformer-Based Approach for Reinventing Web Content Optimisation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.03169)
*Florian Lüttgenau,Imar Colic,Gervasio Ramirez*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对生成式搜索引擎优化（GEO）的领域特定微调方法，通过改进网页内容在大型语言模型输出中的可发现性，显著提升了生成式搜索结果的可见性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统SEO在生成式AI搜索引擎的崛起下逐渐失效，Gartner预测到2026年传统搜索使用量将减少25%，因此需要新的方法来提升网页内容在AI驱动搜索环境中的可见性。

Method: 使用BART-base transformer在合成的训练数据上进行微调，数据包含1,905对经过清理的旅游网站内容（原始文本及其GEO优化版本）。优化版本加入了可信引用、统计证据和语言流畅性改进。

Result: 微调后的模型在ROUGE-L（0.249 vs. 0.226）和BLEU（0.200 vs. 0.173）指标上显著优于基线。优化内容在生成式搜索响应中的可见性显著提升，绝对词数增加15.63%，位置调整词数指标提升30.96%。

Conclusion: 研究表明，针对特定领域的transformer微调可以有效提升网页内容在生成式搜索引擎中的可见性，且计算资源需求适中。GEO为AI驱动搜索环境中的内容优化提供了一种可行方法。

Abstract: The rise of generative AI search engines is disrupting traditional SEO, with
Gartner predicting 25% reduction in conventional search usage by 2026. This
necessitates new approaches for web content visibility in AI-driven search
environments. We present a domain-specific fine-tuning approach for Generative
Engine Optimization (GEO) that transforms web content to improve
discoverability in large language model outputs. Our method fine-tunes a
BART-base transformer on synthetically generated training data comprising 1,905
cleaned travel website content pairs. Each pair consists of raw website text
and its GEO-optimized counterpart incorporating credible citations, statistical
evidence, and improved linguistic fluency. We evaluate using intrinsic metrics
(ROUGE-L, BLEU) and extrinsic visibility assessments through controlled
experiments with Llama-3.3-70B. The fine-tuned model achieves significant
improvements over baseline BART: ROUGE-L scores of 0.249 (vs. 0.226) and BLEU
scores of 0.200 (vs. 0.173). Most importantly, optimized content demonstrates
substantial visibility gains in generative search responses with 15.63%
improvement in absolute word count and 30.96% improvement in position-adjusted
word count metrics. This work provides the first empirical demonstration that
targeted transformer fine-tuning can effectively enhance web content visibility
in generative search engines with modest computational resources. Our results
suggest GEO represents a tractable approach for content optimization in the
AI-driven search landscape, offering concrete evidence that small-scale,
domain-focused fine-tuning yields meaningful improvements in content
discoverability.

</details>


### [779] [LILI clustering algorithm: Limit Inferior Leaf Interval Integrated into Causal Forest for Causal Interference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.03271)
*Yiran Dong,Di Fan,Chuanhou Gao*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出LILI聚类算法，通过连接因果树减少偏差，提高ATE预测准确性，理论和实验验证其优越性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统因果森林方法中，因果树的独立性可能导致分类错误重复出现，从而在因果效应估计中引入显著偏差。

Method: 提出了一种基于Limit Inferior Leaf Interval（LILI）聚类算法的新方法，通过连接因果树的叶子节点，强调数据集混杂因素的相似性，从而减少偏差。

Result: LILI聚类减少了传统因果树方法中的偏差，提高了ATE的预测准确性。理论分析证明了估计ATE的收敛性，实验验证了其优越性能。

Conclusion: LILI聚类算法通过连接因果树，减少了传统因果树方法中的偏差，提高了平均处理效应（ATE）的预测准确性。理论分析和实验验证均证明了LILI的优越性能。

Abstract: Causal forest methods are powerful tools in causal inference. Similar to
traditional random forest in machine learning, causal forest independently
considers each causal tree. However, this independence consideration increases
the likelihood that classification errors in one tree are repeated in others,
potentially leading to significant bias in causal e ect estimation. In this
paper, we propose a novel approach that establishes connections between causal
trees through the Limit Inferior Leaf Interval (LILI) clustering algorithm.
LILIs are constructed based on the leaves of all causal trees, emphasizing the
similarity of dataset confounders. When two instances with di erent treatments
are grouped into the same leaf across a su cient number of causal trees, they
are treated as counterfactual outcomes of each other. Through this clustering
mechanism, LILI clustering reduces bias present in traditional causal tree
methods and enhances the prediction accuracy for the average treatment e ect
(ATE). By integrating LILIs into a causal forest, we develop an e cient causal
inference method. Moreover, we explore several key properties of LILI by
relating it to the concepts of limit inferior and limit superior in the set
theory. Theoretical analysis rigorously proves the convergence of the estimated
ATE using LILI clustering. Empirically, extensive comparative experiments
demonstrate the superior performance of LILI clustering.

</details>


### [780] [Robust estimation of heterogeneous treatment effects in randomized trials leveraging external data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.03681)
*Rickard Karlsson,Piersilvio De Bartolomeis,Issa J. Dahabreh,Jesse H. Krijthe*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: QR-learner是一种模型无关的学习器，用于估计试验人群中的条件平均处理效应（CATE），通过利用外部数据提高统计功效，同时保持一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随机试验通常缺乏统计功效来揭示治疗效果异质性，限制了其在个性化决策中的应用。

Method: 提出QR-learner，结合外部数据估计CATE，并引入与试验专用学习器结合的流程。

Result: 在模拟和实际数据中，QR-learner提高了CATE估计的准确性和检测异质效应的统计功效。

Conclusion: QR-learner在保持一致性的同时，显著提升了CATE估计和异质效应检测的能力。

Abstract: Randomized trials are typically designed to detect average treatment effects
but often lack the statistical power to uncover effect heterogeneity over
patient characteristics, limiting their value for personalized decision-making.
To address this, we propose the QR-learner, a model-agnostic learner that
estimates conditional average treatment effects (CATE) within the trial
population by leveraging external data from other trials or observational
studies. The proposed method is robust: it has the potential to reduce the CATE
prediction mean squared error while maintaining consistency, even when the
external data is not aligned with the trial. Moreover, we introduce a procedure
that combines the QR-learner with a trial-only CATE learner and show that it
asymptotically matches or exceeds the trial-only learner in terms of mean
squared error. We examine the performance of our approach in simulation studies
and apply the methods to a real-world dataset, demonstrating improvements in
both CATE estimation and statistical power for detecting heterogeneous effects.

</details>


### [781] [Determination of Particle-Size Distributions from Light-Scattering Measurement Using Constrained Gaussian Process Regression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.03736)
*Fahime Seyedheydari,Mahdi Nasiri,Marcin Mińkowski,Simo Särkkä*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于约束高斯过程回归的新方法，用于从光学散射测量中稳健估计粒子尺寸分布，解决了逆问题的不稳定性，并通过数值实验验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 粒子尺寸分布的估计通常是一个不适定的逆问题，容易受到测量噪声和数据有限的干扰，导致结果不稳定。

Method: 使用高斯过程先验进行正则化，并通过伪测量和拉格朗日乘数法引入归一化约束，同时采用拉普拉斯算子的特征函数进行谱展开以提高计算效率。

Result: 数值实验表明，该方法能够准确重建粒子尺寸分布，产生数值稳定、平滑且物理可解释的结果。

Conclusion: 该方法为逆散射问题和相关不适定积分方程提供了一种原理清晰且高效的解决方案。

Abstract: In this work, we propose a novel methodology for robustly estimating particle
size distributions from optical scattering measurements using constrained
Gaussian process regression. The estimation of particle size distributions is
commonly formulated as a Fredholm integral equation of the first kind, an
ill-posed inverse problem characterized by instability due to measurement noise
and limited data. To address this, we use a Gaussian process prior to
regularize the solution and integrate a normalization constraint into the
Gaussian process via two approaches: by constraining the Gaussian process using
a pseudo-measurement and by using Lagrange multipliers in the equivalent
optimization problem. To improve computational efficiency, we employ a spectral
expansion of the covariance kernel using eigenfunctions of the Laplace
operator, resulting in a computationally tractable low-rank representation
without sacrificing accuracy. Additionally, we investigate two complementary
strategies for hyperparameter estimation: a data-driven approach based on
maximizing the unconstrained log marginal likelihood, and an alternative
approach where the physical constraints are taken into account. Numerical
experiments demonstrate that the proposed constrained Gaussian process
regression framework accurately reconstructs particle size distributions,
producing numerically stable, smooth, and physically interpretable results.
This methodology provides a principled and efficient solution for addressing
inverse scattering problems and related ill-posed integral equations.

</details>


### [782] [Implicit Regularisation in Diffusion Models: An Algorithm-Dependent Generalisation Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.03756)
*Tyler Farghly,Patrick Rebeschini,George Deligiannidis,Arnaud Doucet*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于算法稳定性的理论框架，用于分析扩散模型的泛化行为，并识别了多种隐式正则化来源。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型在高维设置中的泛化行为尚不明确，现有理论主要依赖模型结构，而忽略了算法本身的泛化机制。

Method: 引入“分数稳定性”概念，量化评分匹配算法对数据集扰动的敏感性，并推导了基于分数稳定性的泛化界。

Result: 通过分析不同学习设置（如早期停止、粗离散化和SGD优化），识别了扩散模型中独特的隐式正则化来源。

Conclusion: 本文通过算法依赖的泛化理论，揭示了扩散模型中此前被忽视的隐式正则化机制，为理解其泛化行为提供了新视角。

Abstract: The success of denoising diffusion models raises important questions
regarding their generalisation behaviour, particularly in high-dimensional
settings. Notably, it has been shown that when training and sampling are
performed perfectly, these models memorise training data -- implying that some
form of regularisation is essential for generalisation. Existing theoretical
analyses primarily rely on algorithm-independent techniques such as uniform
convergence, heavily utilising model structure to obtain generalisation bounds.
In this work, we instead leverage the algorithmic aspects that promote
generalisation in diffusion models, developing a general theory of
algorithm-dependent generalisation for this setting. Borrowing from the
framework of algorithmic stability, we introduce the notion of score stability,
which quantifies the sensitivity of score-matching algorithms to dataset
perturbations. We derive generalisation bounds in terms of score stability, and
apply our framework to several fundamental learning settings, identifying
sources of regularisation. In particular, we consider denoising score matching
with early stopping (denoising regularisation), sampler-wide coarse
discretisation (sampler regularisation) and optimising with SGD (optimisation
regularisation). By grounding our analysis in algorithmic properties rather
than model structure, we identify multiple sources of implicit regularisation
unique to diffusion models that have so far been overlooked in the literature.

</details>


### [783] [Sequential Regression Learning with Randomized Algorithms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.03759)
*Dorival Leão,Reiko Aoki,Teh Led Red*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 随机化SINDy是一种针对动态数据的序列机器学习算法，通过概率方法和功能分析理论实现PAC学习特性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对具有时间依赖结构的动态数据，提出一种能够动态预测并更新权重的方法。

Method: 采用概率方法，结合梯度下降和近端算法更新权重，并引入特征增强和Tikhonov正则化。

Result: 在回归和二元分类任务中，使用真实数据验证了算法的有效性。

Conclusion: 随机化SINDy通过概率分布和动态更新机制，成功应用于动态数据的预测任务。

Abstract: This paper presents ``randomized SINDy", a sequential machine learning
algorithm designed for dynamic data that has a time-dependent structure. It
employs a probabilistic approach, with its PAC learning property rigorously
proven through the mathematical theory of functional analysis. The algorithm
dynamically predicts using a learned probability distribution of predictors,
updating weights via gradient descent and a proximal algorithm to maintain a
valid probability density. Inspired by SINDy (Brunton et al. 2016), it
incorporates feature augmentation and Tikhonov regularization. For multivariate
normal weights, the proximal step is omitted to focus on parameter estimation.
The algorithm's effectiveness is demonstrated through experimental results in
regression and binary classification using real-world data.

</details>


### [784] [Leo Breiman, the Rashomon Effect, and the Occam Dilemma](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.03884)
*Cynthia Rudin*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文重新评估了Breiman的“两种文化”理论，指出其部分观点在现代条件下不再适用，并提出了实现其目标的新方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Breiman的“两种文化”理论在25年前提出，随着计算能力的提升和技术的发展，有必要重新审视其观点，并探讨现代条件下如何实现其目标。

Method: 通过分析Breiman的原始论点，结合现代计算能力和技术发展，重新评估了数据模型和算法模型的优缺点。

Result: 研究发现，Breiman关于“Occam困境”的论点在现代条件下不再普遍成立，且因果性研究可以不依赖于单一模型。

Conclusion: 本文通过现代视角重新审视了Breiman提出的“两种文化”理论，指出其关于数据模型和算法模型的某些观点在现代计算条件下不再完全适用，并提出了实现因果性、简洁性和准确性的新方法。

Abstract: In the famous Two Cultures paper, Leo Breiman provided a visionary
perspective on the cultures of ''data models'' (modeling with consideration of
data generation) versus ''algorithmic models'' (vanilla machine learning
models). I provide a modern perspective on these approaches. One of Breiman's
key arguments against data models is the ''Rashomon Effect,'' which is the
existence of many different-but-equally-good models. The Rashomon Effect
implies that data modelers would not be able to determine which model generated
the data. Conversely, one of his core advantages in favor of data models is
simplicity, as he claimed there exists an ''Occam Dilemma,'' i.e., an
accuracy-simplicity tradeoff. After 25 years of powerful computers, it has
become clear that this claim is not generally true, in that algorithmic models
do not need to be complex to be accurate; however, there are nuances that help
explain Breiman's logic, specifically, that by ''simple,'' he appears to
consider only linear models or unoptimized decision trees. Interestingly, the
Rashomon Effect is a key tool in proving the nullification of the Occam
Dilemma. To his credit though, Breiman did not have the benefit of modern
computers, with which my observations are much easier to make.
  Breiman's goal for interpretability was somewhat intertwined with causality:
simpler models can help reveal which variables have a causal relationship with
the outcome. However, I argue that causality can be investigated without the
use of single models, whether or not they are simple. Interpretability is
useful in its own right, and I think Breiman knew that too.
  Technically, my modern perspective does not belong to either of Breiman's Two
Cultures, but shares the goals of both of them - causality, simplicity,
accuracy - and shows that these goals can be accomplished in other ways,
without the limitations Breiman was concerned about.

</details>


### [785] [Model selection for stochastic dynamics: a parsimonious and principled approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04121)
*Andonis Gerardos*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: PASTIS 是一种新的信息准则，用于从噪声数据中发现随机微分方程，优于现有方法，并针对现实数据问题提供了鲁棒变体。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从噪声和离散时间序列中发现随机微分方程（SDEs）和随机偏微分方程（SPDEs）的主要挑战是从大量候选模型中选择最简单的正确模型，而标准信息准则（AIC、BIC）通常有限。

Method: 引入 PASTIS（Parsimonious Stochastic Inference），这是一种基于极值理论的新信息准则，其惩罚项明确考虑了候选参数库的大小、模型参数数量和显著性阈值。

Result: PASTIS 在多个系统（如 Lorenz、Ornstein-Uhlenbeck、Lotka-Volterra 等）上的基准测试表明，其在精确模型识别和预测能力方面优于 AIC、BIC、交叉验证（CV）和 SINDy。此外，针对现实数据中的大采样间隔或测量噪声，PASTIS 的鲁棒变体（PASTIS-Δt 和 PASTIS-σ）扩展了其适用性。

Conclusion: PASTIS 提供了一种统计基础、经过验证且实用的方法框架，用于发现具有随机动态过程的简单模型。

Abstract: This thesis focuses on the discovery of stochastic differential equations
(SDEs) and stochastic partial differential equations (SPDEs) from noisy and
discrete time series. A major challenge is selecting the simplest possible
correct model from vast libraries of candidate models, where standard
information criteria (AIC, BIC) are often limited.
  We introduce PASTIS (Parsimonious Stochastic Inference), a new information
criterion derived from extreme value theory. Its penalty term, $n_\mathcal{B}
\ln(n_0/p)$, explicitly incorporates the size of the initial library of
candidate parameters ($n_0$), the number of parameters in the considered model
($n_\mathcal{B}$), and a significance threshold ($p$). This significance
threshold represents the probability of selecting a model containing more
parameters than necessary when comparing many models.
  Benchmarks on various systems (Lorenz, Ornstein-Uhlenbeck, Lotka-Volterra for
SDEs; Gray-Scott for SPDEs) demonstrate that PASTIS outperforms AIC, BIC,
cross-validation (CV), and SINDy (a competing method) in terms of exact model
identification and predictive capability.
  Furthermore, real-world data can be subject to large sampling intervals
($\Delta t$) or measurement noise ($\sigma$), which can impair model learning
and selection capabilities. To address this, we have developed robust variants
of PASTIS, PASTIS-$\Delta t$ and PASTIS-$\sigma$, thus extending the
applicability of the approach to imperfect experimental data.
  PASTIS thus provides a statistically grounded, validated, and practical
methodological framework for discovering simple models for processes with
stochastic dynamics.

</details>


### [786] [Where to Intervene: Action Selection in Deep Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04187)
*Wenbo Zhang,Hengrui Cai*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出了一种数据驱动的动作选择方法，结合模型无关和计算友好的特性，显著提升了深度强化学习在复杂环境中的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高维动作选择是深度强化学习中的关键问题，现有方法依赖专家经验或计算复杂度高，限制了其通用性。

Method: 提出了一种通用的数据驱动动作选择方法，结合模型无关和计算友好的特性，并通过knockoff采样控制误发现率。

Result: 实验验证了理论保证，表明该方法在变量选择和整体奖励方面优于其他技术。

Conclusion: 该方法为深度强化学习中的动作选择提供了一种高效且通用的解决方案。

Abstract: Deep reinforcement learning (RL) has gained widespread adoption in recent
years but faces significant challenges, particularly in unknown and complex
environments. Among these, high-dimensional action selection stands out as a
critical problem. Existing works often require a sophisticated prior design to
eliminate redundancy in the action space, relying heavily on domain expert
experience or involving high computational complexity, which limits their
generalizability across different RL tasks. In this paper, we address these
challenges by proposing a general data-driven action selection approach with
model-free and computationally friendly properties. Our method not only selects
minimal sufficient actions but also controls the false discovery rate via
knockoff sampling. More importantly, we seamlessly integrate the action
selection into deep RL methods during online training. Empirical experiments
validate the established theoretical guarantees, demonstrating that our method
surpasses various alternative techniques in terms of both performance in
variable selection and overall achieved rewards.

</details>


### [787] [Mixed-Sample SGD: an End-to-end Analysis of Supervised Transfer Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04194)
*Yuyang Deng,Samory Kpotufe*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种用于监督迁移学习（STL）的SGD方法，通过交替采样源和目标数据，自动适应源数据的质量，避免负迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有STL研究主要关注统计方面，而高效优化方法较少。本文旨在设计一种自适应采样机制，以在源数据有用时利用其信息，否则偏向目标数据。

Method: 提出了一种混合样本SGD方法，基于跟踪一系列约束凸程序，确保迁移性能。在线性回归和平方损失的具体场景中进行了实现。

Result: 方法在目标数据上的统计性能能够自适应源数据的未知质量，收敛速度为$1/\sqrt{T}$。实验验证了理论结果。

Conclusion: 该方法在保持统计迁移保证的同时，实现了高效优化，适用于一般预测任务，并在实验中表现良好。

Abstract: Theoretical works on supervised transfer learning (STL) -- where the learner
has access to labeled samples from both source and target distributions -- have
for the most part focused on statistical aspects of the problem, while
efficient optimization has received less attention. We consider the problem of
designing an SGD procedure for STL that alternates sampling between source and
target data, while maintaining statistical transfer guarantees without prior
knowledge of the quality of the source data. A main algorithmic difficulty is
in understanding how to design such an adaptive sub-sampling mechanism at each
SGD step, to automatically gain from the source when it is informative, or bias
towards the target and avoid negative transfer when the source is less
informative.
  We show that, such a mixed-sample SGD procedure is feasible for general
prediction tasks with convex losses, rooted in tracking an abstract sequence of
constrained convex programs that serve to maintain the desired transfer
guarantees.
  We instantiate these results in the concrete setting of linear regression
with square loss, and show that the procedure converges, with $1/\sqrt{T}$
rate, to a solution whose statistical performance on the target is adaptive to
the a priori unknown quality of the source. Experiments with synthetic and real
datasets support the theory.

</details>


### [788] [Inertial Quadratic Majorization Minimization with Application to Kernel Regularized Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04247)
*Qiang Heng,Caixing Wang*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种介于一阶和二阶方法之间的优化框架QMME，通过固定曲率的二次主化最小化，平衡了迭代成本和收敛速度，并在大规模核正则化学习中展示了其优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 一阶方法迭代成本低但收敛慢，二阶方法收敛快但Hessian逆计算成本高，因此需要一种折中方案。

Method: 提出了QMME框架，通过固定曲率的二次主化最小化，并利用矩阵分解的复用技术。

Result: QMME在大规模核正则化学习中表现优于传统一阶和二阶方法，并能高效处理大投影维度的草图矩阵。

Conclusion: QMME提供了一种高效且实用的优化方法，特别适用于大规模核学习问题，且代码开源可复现。

Abstract: First-order methods in convex optimization offer low per-iteration cost but
often suffer from slow convergence, while second-order methods achieve fast
local convergence at the expense of costly Hessian inversions. In this paper,
we highlight a middle ground: minimizing a quadratic majorant with fixed
curvature at each iteration. This strategy strikes a balance between
per-iteration cost and convergence speed, and crucially allows the reuse of
matrix decompositions, such as Cholesky or spectral decompositions, across
iterations and varying regularization parameters. We introduce the Quadratic
Majorization Minimization with Extrapolation (QMME) framework and establish its
sequential convergence properties under standard assumptions. The new
perspective of our analysis is to center the arguments around the induced norm
of the curvature matrix $H$. To demonstrate practical advantages, we apply QMME
to large-scale kernel regularized learning problems. In particular, we propose
a novel Sylvester equation modelling technique for kernel multinomial
regression. In Julia-based experiments, QMME compares favorably against various
established first- and second-order methods. Furthermore, we demonstrate that
our algorithms complement existing kernel approximation techniques through more
efficiently handling sketching matrices with large projection dimensions. Our
numerical experiments and real data analysis are available and fully
reproducible at https://github.com/qhengncsu/QMME.jl.

</details>


### [789] [Bandit Pareto Set Identification in a Multi-Output Linear Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04255)
*Cyrille Kone,Emilie Kaufmann,Laura Richert*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究了多输出线性赌博机模型中的帕累托集识别问题，提出了基于最优设计的算法，并在固定预算和固定置信度设置下提供了近乎最优的保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究如何在多输出线性赌博机模型中高效识别非支配臂（帕累托集），以解决现有方法的不足。

Method: 引入基于最优设计的算法，通过自适应采样来识别非支配臂，理论分析表明任务难度主要取决于h个臂的次优间隙。

Result: 在合成和真实数据集上的广泛实验验证了算法的有效性，证明了其近乎最优的性能。

Conclusion: 提出的算法在多输出线性赌博机模型中高效解决了帕累托集识别问题，为相关领域提供了新的解决方案。

Abstract: We study the Pareto Set Identification (PSI) problem in a structured
multi-output linear bandit model. In this setting, each arm is associated a
feature vector belonging to $\mathbb{R}^h$, and its mean vector in
$\mathbb{R}^d$ linearly depends on this feature vector through a common unknown
matrix $\Theta \in \mathbb{R}^{h \times d}$. The goal is to identify the set of
non-dominated arms by adaptively collecting samples from the arms. We introduce
and analyze the first optimal design-based algorithms for PSI, providing nearly
optimal guarantees in both the fixed-budget and the fixed-confidence settings.
Notably, we show that the difficulty of these tasks mainly depends on the
sub-optimality gaps of $h$ arms only. Our theoretical results are supported by
an extensive benchmark on synthetic and real-world datasets.

</details>


### [790] [Efficient Perplexity Bound and Ratio Matching in Discrete Diffusion Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04341)
*Etrit Haxholli,Yeti Z. Gürbüz,Oğul Can,Eli Waxman*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文改进了离散扩散模型，通过新定理和去噪交叉熵优化，显著提升了语言建模的性能和效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管连续扩散模型在连续分布建模中表现出色，但在分类数据上的应用效果不佳。本文旨在通过改进离散扩散模型框架，提升其在语言建模中的性能。

Method: 本文首先提出了三个关于KL散度的新定理，作为连续扩散模型的离散对应。其次，通过最小化干净数据与噪声数据之间的去噪交叉熵进行比率匹配，并引入了一种新的CTMC转移率矩阵。

Result: 实验结果表明，使用去噪交叉熵的模型在困惑度和生成效率上优于使用分数熵的模型，困惑度降低10%，训练速度提升15%。

Conclusion: 本文通过引入三个关于KL散度的新定理，改进了离散扩散模型的性能，并通过实验验证了去噪交叉熵优于分数熵，同时提出了一种新的CTMC转移率矩阵，进一步提升了模型的效率和效果。

Abstract: While continuous diffusion models excel in modeling continuous distributions,
their application to categorical data has been less effective. Recent work has
shown that ratio-matching through score-entropy within a continuous-time
discrete Markov chain (CTMC) framework serves as a competitive alternative to
autoregressive models in language modeling. To enhance this framework, we first
introduce three new theorems concerning the KL divergence between the data and
learned distribution. Our results serve as the discrete counterpart to those
established for continuous diffusion models and allow us to derive an improved
upper bound of the perplexity. Second, we empirically show that ratio-matching
performed by minimizing the denoising cross-entropy between the clean and
corrupted data enables models to outperform those utilizing score-entropy with
up to 10% lower perplexity/generative-perplexity, and 15% faster training
steps. To further support our findings, we introduce and evaluate a novel CTMC
transition-rate matrix that allows prediction refinement, and derive the
analytic expression for its matrix exponential which facilitates the
computation of conditional ratios thus enabling efficient training and
generation.

</details>


### [791] [Neural Networks for Tamed Milstein Approximation of SDEs with Additive Symmetric Jump Noise Driven by a Poisson Random Measure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04417)
*Ramirez-Gonzalez Jose-Hermenegildo,Sun Ying*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种结合Tamed-Milstein方案和神经网络的非参数方法，用于估计由特定Lévy过程驱动的随机微分方程中的漂移和扩散函数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法在处理具有状态依赖噪声和由Lévy过程驱动的不连续性的系统时存在局限性，需要一种更灵活的非参数方法。

Method: 使用神经网络作为非参数函数逼近器，结合Tamed-Milstein方案，对漂移函数和扩散系数进行估计。

Result: 提出的方法能够有效建模复杂的非线性动态，无需假设限制性函数形式。

Conclusion: 该方法为具有状态依赖噪声和Lévy过程驱动的系统提供了一种灵活的推断框架。

Abstract: This work aims to estimate the drift and diffusion functions in stochastic
differential equations (SDEs) driven by a particular class of L\'evy processes
with finite jump intensity, using neural networks. We propose a framework that
integrates the Tamed-Milstein scheme with neural networks employed as
non-parametric function approximators. Estimation is carried out in a
non-parametric fashion for the drift function \( f: \mathbb{Z} \to \mathbb{R}
\), the diffusion coefficient \( g: \mathbb{Z} \to \mathbb{R} \). The model of
interest is given by \[ dX(t) = \xi + f(X(t))\, dt + g(X(t))\, dW_t + \gamma
\int_{\mathbb{Z}} z\, N(dt,dz), \] where \( W_t \) is a standard Brownian
motion, and \( N(dt,dz) \) is a Poisson random measure on \( (~\mathbb{R}_{+}
~\times ~\mathbb{Z}~, ~\mathcal{B}~(~\mathbb{R}_{+}~)~\otimes~\mathcal{Z}~,~
\lambda( \Lambda~\otimes~v~)~) \), with \( \lambda, \gamma > 0 \), \( \Lambda
\) being the Lebesgue measure on \( \mathbb{R}_{+} \), and \( v \) a finite
measure on the measurable space \( (\mathbb{Z}, \mathcal{Z}) \).
  Neural networks are used as non-parametric function approximators, enabling
the modeling of complex nonlinear dynamics without assuming restrictive
functional forms. The proposed methodology constitutes a flexible alternative
for inference in systems with state-dependent noise and discontinuities driven
by L\'evy processes.

</details>


### [792] [The Joys of Categorical Conformal Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04441)
*Michele Caprio*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: CP 通过范畴论框架被证明是一种内在的不确定性量化工具，能够桥接多种统计方法，并在隐私保护中保持鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探讨 CP 作为不确定性量化工具的理论基础，澄清其概念模糊性。

Method: 采用范畴论方法，将 CP 框架为两个新定义范畴的态射，并证明 CP 区域是一个协变函子的像。

Result: 证明 CP 是一种内在的不确定性量化机制，能够桥接多种统计推理方法，并且在隐私保护中具有鲁棒性。

Conclusion: Conformal prediction (CP) 是一种结构上具有不确定性量化能力的机制，能够桥接贝叶斯、频率论和不精确概率方法，并且在隐私保护中具有鲁棒性。

Abstract: Conformal prediction (CP) is an Uncertainty Representation technique that
delivers finite-sample calibrated prediction regions for any underlying Machine
Learning model, yet its status as an Uncertainty Quantification (UQ) tool has
remained conceptually opaque. We adopt a category-theoretic approach to CP --
framing it as a morphism, embedded in a commuting diagram, of two newly-defined
categories -- that brings us three joys. First, we show that -- under minimal
assumptions -- CP is intrinsically a UQ mechanism, that is, its UQ capabilities
are a structural feature of the method. Second, we demonstrate that CP bridges
(and perhaps subsumes) the Bayesian, frequentist, and imprecise probabilistic
approaches to predictive statistical reasoning. Finally, we show that a
conformal prediction region (CPR) is the image of a covariant functor. This
observation is relevant to AI privacy: It implies that privacy noise added
locally does not break coverage.

</details>


### [793] [Optimal Model Selection for Conformalized Robust Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04716)
*Yajie Bao,Yang Hu,Haojie Ren,Peng Zhao,Changliang Zou*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出两种模型选择框架（CROMS和CROiMS）用于上下文鲁棒优化，提升了决策效率和鲁棒性，实验验证了其优越性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在不确定性决策中，CRO通过最小化预测集上的最坏情况决策损失来提供可靠性，但模型选择对下游决策至关重要。

Method: 提出了CROMS框架（包括E-CROMS和F-CROMS算法）和CROiMS框架，分别通过平均决策风险和条件决策风险最小化来选择模型。

Result: CROiMS在理论上实现了渐近条件鲁棒性和决策效率，数值实验表明其在合成和实际应用中优于基线方法。

Conclusion: 本文提出了两种新颖的模型选择框架（CROMS和CROiMS），用于上下文鲁棒优化（CRO），显著提升了决策效率和鲁棒性，并在理论和实验中验证了其优越性。

Abstract: In decision-making under uncertainty, Contextual Robust Optimization (CRO)
provides reliability by minimizing the worst-case decision loss over a
prediction set, hedging against label variability. While recent advances use
conformal prediction to construct prediction sets for machine learning models,
the downstream decisions critically depend on model selection. This paper
introduces novel model selection frameworks for CRO that unify robustness
control with decision risk minimization. We first propose Conformalized Robust
Optimization with Model Selection (CROMS), which automatically selects models
to approximately minimize the average decision risk in CRO solutions. We
develop two algorithms: E-CROMS, which is computationally efficient, and
F-CROMS, which enjoys a marginal robustness guarantee in finite samples.
Further, we introduce Conformalized Robust Optimization with Individualized
Model Selection (CROiMS), which performs individualized model selection by
minimizing the conditional decision risk given the covariate of test data. This
framework advances conformal prediction methodology by enabling covariate-aware
model selection. Theoretically, CROiMS achieves asymptotic conditional
robustness and decision efficiency under mild assumptions. Numerical results
demonstrate significant improvements in decision efficiency and robustness
across diverse synthetic and real-world applications, outperforming baseline
approaches.

</details>


### [794] [Intervening to learn and compose disentangled representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04754)
*Alex Markham,Jeri A. Chang,Isaac Hirsch,Liam Solus,Bryon Aragam*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出了一种新方法，通过在现有解码器块上添加一个简单的仅解码器模块，同时学习解缠的潜在结构，挑战了生成模型中表达性与结构性的传统权衡观点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统观点认为在生成模型中，表达性与结构性之间存在根本性张力，本文挑战这一观点，旨在同时实现高表达性和解缠的潜在结构学习。

Method: 在现有解码器块头部添加一个仅解码器模块，该模块通过隐式反转编码器的线性表示来处理概念信息，并受因果图模型中干预概念的启发，选择性修改其架构以学习不同上下文下的紧凑联合模型。

Result: 该方法能够学习解缠的表示，并支持分布外生成。此外，还证明了新的可识别性结果，扩展了非线性模型中结构化表示识别的现有工作。

Conclusion: 通过简单的模块添加，可以在保持高表达性的同时学习解缠的潜在结构，为生成模型的设计提供了新的思路。

Abstract: In designing generative models, it is commonly believed that in order to
learn useful latent structure, we face a fundamental tension between
expressivity and structure. In this paper we challenge this view by proposing a
new approach to training arbitrarily expressive generative models that
simultaneously learn disentangled latent structure. This is accomplished by
adding a simple decoder-only module to the head of an existing decoder block
that can be arbitrarily complex. The module learns to process concept
information by implicitly inverting linear representations from an encoder.
Inspired by the notion of intervention in causal graphical models, our module
selectively modifies its architecture during training, allowing it to learn a
compact joint model over different contexts. We show how adding this module
leads to disentangled representations that can be composed for
out-of-distribution generation. To further validate our proposed approach, we
prove a new identifiability result that extends existing work on identifying
structured representations in nonlinear models.

</details>


### [795] [Sure Convergence and Constructive Universal Approximation for Multi-Layer Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04779)
*Chien-Ming Chi*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 01Neuro是一种基于指示器激活神经元的新型神经网络模型，其增强版本具有统计保证和构造性通用逼近能力，但计算成本较高。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 提出一种具有统计保证和构造性通用逼近能力的神经网络模型，以解决现有模型在训练过程和逼近能力上的不足。

Method: 采用指示器激活神经元构建01Neuro模型，并通过增强框架结合随机训练和bagging技术以提高预测稳定性。

Result: 在模拟和真实数据集上验证了模型的有效性，表现出对交互项的逼近能力、预测稳定性、对噪声特征的鲁棒性以及对特征缩放的不敏感性。

Conclusion: 01Neuro模型在统计性能和逼近能力上具有优势，但当前实现的计算成本较高，需要进一步优化。

Abstract: We propose a new neural network model, 01Neuro, built on indicator activation
neurons. Its boosted variant possesses two key statistical properties: (1) Sure
Convergence, where model optimization can be achieved with high probability
given sufficient computational resources; and (2) Constructive Universal
Approximation: In the infinite sample setting, the model can approximate any
finite sum of measurable functions, each depending on only k out of p input
features, provided the architecture is properly tuned. Unlike most universal
approximation results that are agnostic to training procedures, our guarantees
are directly tied to the model's explicit construction and optimization
algorithm. To improve prediction stability, we integrate stochastic training
and bagging into the boosted 01Neuro framework. Empirical evaluations on
simulated and real-world tabular datasets with small to medium sample sizes
highlight its strengths: effective approximation of interaction components
(multiplicative terms), stable prediction performance (comparable to Random
Forests), robustness to many noisy features, and insensitivity to feature
scaling. A major limitation of the current implementation of boosted 01Neuro is
its higher computational cost, which is approximately 5 to 30 times that of
Random Forests and XGBoost.

</details>


### [796] [Vecchia-Inducing-Points Full-Scale Approximations for Gaussian Processes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.05064)
*Tim Gyger,Reinhard Furrer,Fabio Sigrist*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出了一种结合全局诱导点和局部Vecchia近似的VIF方法，显著提高了高斯过程在大数据集上的计算效率和准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高斯过程在大数据集上的计算效率受限，需要一种既能处理高维输入又能适应不同协方差函数的方法。

Method: 结合全局诱导点和局部Vecchia近似，使用基于相关性的邻居查找策略，并通过改进的覆盖树算法实现。

Result: VIF方法在计算效率和准确性上优于现有方法，且适用于非高斯似然。

Conclusion: VIF方法是一种高效、准确且数值稳定的高斯过程近似方法，适用于大规模数据集。

Abstract: Gaussian processes are flexible, probabilistic, non-parametric models widely
